infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: HireCircle needs camera access to capture your interview and profile videos.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: HireCircle needs microphone access to record audio with your interview videos.
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: HireCircle needs speech recognition to update interview progress in real time.
infoPlist.NSUserNotificationUsageDescription: HireCircle uses notifications for chat messages, application updates, and matches.

plugins.cameraPermission: HireCircle needs camera access to capture your interview and profile videos.
plugins.microphonePermission: HireCircle needs microphone access to record audio with your interview videos.
Allow HireCircle to use the microphone for Smart Interview live progress.
plugins.speechRecognitionPermission: Allow HireCircle to transcribe your answers for Smart Interview live progress.

plugins.microphonePermission: HireCircle needs microphone access to record audio with your voice posts and interview videos.

plugins.photosPermission: HireCircle needs photo library access so you can upload your profile picture and attachments.
plugins.cameraPermission: HireCircle needs camera access to capture your profile picture.
